implemented: Complete lexical structure with identifiers, keywords, comments, and whitespace handling
Grammar parsing for program structure, declarations, statements, expressions
Semicolon insertion rules based on token boundaries
All core literals: int, string, bool, nil, float
Variable bindings with let/const and shadowing support
Const immutability with sorry() forgiveness mechanism
Function declarations and calls with implicit return
Control flow: if/else expressions and match expressions with patterns
Error propagation operator ? for result values
Result type constructors ok(x) and err(x)
Built-in functions: speak, doom, chant, len, sorry
CLI with run and repl commands
Complete test suite with golden file testing
